name: Alpha Vantage
description: Get real-time and historical stock prices, forex rates, and crypto data. Free tier available with 25 requests/day.

auth.hint: Get a free API key at alphavantage.co/support/#api-key. Use "demo" as the key for testing a few endpoints.

tools.name: get_stock_quote
tools.description: Get the latest price, volume, open, high, low, and change for a stock.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Stock ticker, e.g. AAPL, GOOGL, AMZN

tools.name: get_daily_prices
tools.description: Get up to 20 years of daily open/close/high/low/volume data for a stock.

params.name: outputsize
params.description: compact (last 100 days) or full (all available data)

tools.name: search_symbol
tools.description: Search for a stock symbol by company name or keyword.

params.name: keywords
params.description: Company name or keyword, e.g. "Tesla" or "Apple"

tools.name: get_forex_rate
tools.description: Get real-time currency exchange rate between any two currencies.

params.name: from_currency
params.description: Source currency code, e.g. USD or BTC

params.name: to_currency
params.description: Target currency code, e.g. BRL or ETH
